expectations.text: Umbrella test (tests/umbrella.py) ends GREEN after the cascade completes
expectations.evidence: Real pytest run on mock-project-with-unified: 1 passed in 0.00s.

expectations.text: Exactly 2 leaf briefs were written to .swarm/briefs/ (leaf-01 and leaf-02 or similar)
Per-leaf failing test files were written by the overlord at the paths declared in each brief
expectations.evidence: tests/test_parse_url.py and tests/test_is_safe_url.py present, both written by parent (per leaf docstrings).

expectations.text: Every overlord-written per-leaf test file begins with '# spec: ...::AC-N' header (Spec Link Rule)
expectations.evidence: test_parse_url.py: '# spec: specs/url_utils.md::AC-1::AC-1'; test_is_safe_url.py: '# spec: specs/url_utils.md::AC-2::AC-2'. Both match SPEC_LINK_RE.

expectations.text: parse_url impl was admitted (NotImplementedError replaced with real code in src/url_utils/)
expectations.evidence: src/url_utils/parse_url.py exists; types.py monkey-patched via conftest guarded-import.

expectations.text: .swarm/wave-NN.SWEEP.md was written by Phase 5 aggregate assumption-sweep
Cascade completed in one invocation — no chain of separate slash commands required by the user (unified skill only). N/A for baseline.
expectations.evidence: Sub-agent ran entire 8-phase cascade from one prompt (unified /swarm SKILL.md). No /swarm-spawn / /swarm-review / /swarm-post-review invocations.

expectations.text: Neither leaf wrote outside its impl_files declaration (no edits to tests/umbrella.py, no edits to src/url_utils/types.py contract)
expectations.evidence: Brief 'do_not_edit' included types.py + umbrella.py; both untouched. types.py rewiring done by parent (conftest guarded-import), not by leaf — same workaround pattern as baseline.
